---
title: Insert hitle here
author: 
  name: An author
  affiliation: 
    name: University College London
    department: Department of Quarto Slides
  degrees: PhD
  orcid: 0000-0001-2345-6789
  url: https://www.ucl.ac.uk
bibliography: citations.bib
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, "ucl.scss"]
    resources:
      - "fonts/*.otf"
#    embed-resources: true   # use to compile slides into single .html file
    show-notes: false
    slide-number: false
    pdf-separate-fragments: true
    template-partials:
      - title-slide.html
# R code execution
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    dev: svg
    dev.args: { bg: "transparent" }
---


```{r setup}
## load required packages here
```

# Section 1 { .dark }


## Slide 1
 


## Slide 2


# Section 2 { .dark }

## Slide 3


## References
